results.title: 'Honoring veterans should not be controversial' — Rep. Sykes blasts cancellation of Arlington women's ceremony
results.description: U.S. Rep. Emilia Sykes criticized Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and the Trump administration for blocking military branches from participating in an annual event at Arlington National Cemetery to honor fallen women.

results.title: NDA hails PM Modi’s 12-year governance milestone, calls it era of ‘Performance
results.description: The National Democratic Alliance (NDA) on Wednesday passed a resolution marking 12 years of the Narendra Modi-led Union government, describing it as a defining phase of “people-centric development, participative democracy and performance-oriented governance”. The resolution was adopted at a high-level NDA meeting in New Delhi, where coalition allies congratulated Prime Minister Narendra Modi for ... The post NDA hails PM Modi’s 12-year governance milestone, calls it era of ‘Performance appeared first on Central Chronicle .

results.title: 6-7, Bad Bunny, AI: Pope targets the young
results.description: Six-sevening crowds and joking about Bad Bunny, AI and football rivalries -- 70-year-old Pope Leo XIV has appealed to a younger crowd during his visit to Spain as part of his efforts to revive the Catholic Church.

results.title: Trump sticks with Pulte for intel job as risk grows of lapse in spy powers
Artists bail on Trump's Great American State Fair. Califoirnia won't
results.description: The exodus of musical acts from Trump's Great American State Fair hasn't spread to states. California still plans to put on a pavilion.
